links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: jensoni is widely separated from the other subspecies, found in northeastern Peru's Department of Loreto. The subspecies of the black-headed antbird differ somewhat in their habitats, but in general they occur in lowland and foothill terra firme evergreen forest and mature secondary woodland
